import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/components/WorldRenderer.tsx");const _jsxDEV = __vite__cjsImport29_react_jsxDevRuntime["jsxDEV"]; const _Fragment = __vite__cjsImport29_react_jsxDevRuntime["Fragment"];const React = __vite__cjsImport0_react; const useRef = __vite__cjsImport0_react["useRef"]; const useMemo = __vite__cjsImport0_react["useMemo"]; const useEffect = __vite__cjsImport0_react["useEffect"]; const useState = __vite__cjsImport0_react["useState"]; const Suspense = __vite__cjsImport0_react["Suspense"];import __vite__cjsImport0_react from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react.js?v=682d41b7";

var _s = $RefreshSig$(), _s2 = $RefreshSig$(), _s3 = $RefreshSig$(), _s4 = $RefreshSig$(), _s5 = $RefreshSig$(), _s6 = $RefreshSig$(), _s7 = $RefreshSig$(), _s8 = $RefreshSig$(), _s9 = $RefreshSig$(), _s10 = $RefreshSig$(), _s11 = $RefreshSig$(), _s12 = $RefreshSig$(), _s13 = $RefreshSig$(), _s14 = $RefreshSig$(), _s15 = $RefreshSig$(), _s16 = $RefreshSig$(), _s17 = $RefreshSig$(), _s18 = $RefreshSig$(), _s19 = $RefreshSig$(), _s20 = $RefreshSig$(), _s21 = $RefreshSig$();

	"Masculine Presentation": "holo_head_masc_1783307851588.png",

export const OptimizedModel = ({ url, scaleToDimension, scaling, colorTint }) => {
	_s();
	const { scene } = useGLTF(url);
	const clone = useMemo(() => scene.clone(), [scene]);
	useEffect(() => {
		const clonedMaterials = [];
		clone.traverse((child) => {
			if (child.isMesh) {
				const mesh = child;
				mesh.castShadow = true;
				mesh.receiveShadow = true;
				if (colorTint) {
					if (Array.isArray(mesh.material)) {
						mesh.material = mesh.material.map((m) => {
							const cloned = m.clone();
							clonedMaterials.push(cloned);
							if ("color" in cloned) {
								cloned.color.set(colorTint);
							}
							return cloned;
						});
					} else if (mesh.material) {
						const cloned = mesh.material.clone();
						clonedMaterials.push(cloned);
						if ("color" in cloned) {
							cloned.color.set(colorTint);
						}
						mesh.material = cloned;
					}
				}
			}
		});
		return () => {
			clonedMaterials.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
		};
	}, [clone, colorTint]);
	const scale = scaling || (scaleToDimension ? [
		scaleToDimension,
		scaleToDimension,
		scaleToDimension
	] : [
		1,
		1,
		1
	]);
	return /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("primitive", {
		object: clone,
		scale
	}, void 0, false, {
		fileName: _jsxFileName,
		lineNumber: 131,
		columnNumber: 10
	}, this);
};
_s(OptimizedModel, "Ydclg3vyfrDVDqz/ppT5SlYkMs8=", false, function() {
	return [useGLTF];
});
_c = OptimizedModel;
export const AnimatedModel = ({ url, currentState, scaleToDimension, scaling, colorTint }) => {
	_s2();
	const { scene, animations } = useGLTF(url);
	const clone = useMemo(() => scene.clone(), [scene]);
	// We lazily import AnimationController to avoid circular dependencies if it ends up needing one,
	// but we can also just use the one from our systems.
	const { AnimationController } = require("../systems/animation/AnimationController");
	useEffect(() => {
		const clonedMaterials = [];
		clone.traverse((child) => {
			if (child.isMesh) {
				const mesh = child;
				mesh.castShadow = true;
				mesh.receiveShadow = true;
				if (colorTint) {
					if (Array.isArray(mesh.material)) {
						mesh.material = mesh.material.map((m) => {
							const cloned = m.clone();
							clonedMaterials.push(cloned);
							if ("color" in cloned) {
								cloned.color.set(colorTint);
							}
							return cloned;
						});
					} else if (mesh.material) {
						const cloned = mesh.material.clone();
						clonedMaterials.push(cloned);
						if ("color" in cloned) {
							cloned.color.set(colorTint);
						}
						mesh.material = cloned;
					}
				}
			}
		});
		return () => {
			clonedMaterials.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
		};
	}, [clone, colorTint]);
	let finalScale = scaling || [
		1,
		1,
		1
	];
	if (scaleToDimension && !scaling) {
		const box = new THREE.Box3().setFromObject(clone);
		const size = new THREE.Vector3();
		box.getSize(size);
		const maxDim = Math.max(size.x, size.y, size.z);
		const s = maxDim > 0 ? scaleToDimension / maxDim : 1;
		finalScale = [
			s,
			s,
			s
		];
	}
	// If the model has animations, wrap it in AnimationController
	if (animations && animations.length > 0) {
		// If the requested state doesn't exist, fallback to the first animation
		const hasRequestedState = animations.some((a) => a.name === currentState);
		const actualState = hasRequestedState ? currentState : animations[0].name;
		return /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("group", {
			scale: finalScale,
			children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(AnimationController, {
				animations,
				currentState: actualState,
				children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("primitive", { object: clone }, void 0, false, {
					fileName: _jsxFileName,
					lineNumber: 201,
					columnNumber: 11
				}, this)
			}, void 0, false, {
				fileName: _jsxFileName,
				lineNumber: 200,
				columnNumber: 9
			}, this)
		}, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 199,
			columnNumber: 7
		}, this);
	}
	return /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("group", {
		scale: finalScale,
		children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("primitive", { object: clone }, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 209,
			columnNumber: 7
		}, this)
	}, void 0, false, {
		fileName: _jsxFileName,
		lineNumber: 208,
		columnNumber: 5
	}, this);
};
_s2(AnimatedModel, "fY6CFKmDIH35psmy4hFQItQylO4=", false, function() {
	return [useGLTF];
});
_c2 = AnimatedModel;
const PhysicsBox = ({ position, args }) => {
	_s3();
	useBox(() => ({
		type: "Static",
		args,
		position
	}));
	return null;
};
_s3(PhysicsBox, "cc5THlbGqklpQ7DJLAf4WSHQmA0=", false, function() {
	return [useBox];
});
_c3 = PhysicsBox;
const InstancedModel = ({ url, instances }) => {
	_s4();
	const { scene } = useGLTF(url);
	const meshes = useMemo(() => {
		const list = [];
		scene.traverse((child) => {
			if (child.isMesh) {
				list.push(child);
			}
		});
		return list;
	}, [scene]);
	return /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(_Fragment, { children: meshes.map((mesh, meshIdx) => /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(Instances, {
		geometry: mesh.geometry,
		material: mesh.material,
		castShadow: true,
		receiveShadow: true,
		children: instances.map((inst, instIdx) => /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(Instance, {
			position: inst.position,
			scale: inst.scale || [
				1,
				1,
				1
			]
		}, instIdx, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 243,
			columnNumber: 13
		}, this))
	}, meshIdx, false, {
		fileName: _jsxFileName,
		lineNumber: 241,
		columnNumber: 9
	}, this)) }, void 0, false, {
		fileName: _jsxFileName,
		lineNumber: 239,
		columnNumber: 5
	}, this);
};
_s4(InstancedModel, "krVDb644HCgz5JyAAZw5Q1m+p5A=", false, function() {
	return [useGLTF];
});
_c4 = InstancedModel;
// Safe wrapper for Drei Environment preset to handle offline CDN download failures gracefully
class SafeEnvironment extends React.Component {
	constructor(props) {
		super(props);
		this.state = { hasError: false };
	}
	static getDerivedStateFromError() {
		return { hasError: true };
	}
	componentDidCatch(error) {
		console.warn("Environment preset failed to load offline:", error);
	}
	render() {
		if (this.state.hasError) {
			return null;
		}
		return this.props.children;
	}
}
// ------------------------------------------------------------------
// SCENE SETUP & MODULAR ENVIRONMENT
// ------------------------------------------------------------------
const SceneSetup = () => {
	_s5();
	const shadowQuality = useGraphicsSettingsStore((state) => state.shadowQuality);
	const shadowMapSize = useMemo(() => {
		switch (shadowQuality) {
			case "low": return [256, 256];
			case "medium": return [512, 512];
			case "high":
			default: return [1024, 1024];
		}
	}, [shadowQuality]);
	return /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(_Fragment, { children: [
		/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(TelemetryDashboard, {}, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 290,
			columnNumber: 7
		}, this),
		/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(Sky, {
			sunPosition: [
				100,
				20,
				100
			],
			turbidity: .3,
			rayleigh: .5
		}, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 291,
			columnNumber: 7
		}, this),
		/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("color", {
			attach: "background",
			args: ["#0f172a"]
		}, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 294,
			columnNumber: 7
		}, this),
		/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(SafeEnvironment, {}, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 297,
			columnNumber: 7
		}, this),
		/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("ambientLight", { intensity: shadowQuality === "low" ? .6 : .4 }, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 301,
			columnNumber: 7
		}, this),
		/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("directionalLight", {
			castShadow: shadowQuality !== "low",
			position: [
				30,
				50,
				-30
			],
			intensity: 2,
			"shadow-mapSize": shadowMapSize,
			"shadow-camera-left": -50,
			"shadow-camera-right": 50,
			"shadow-camera-top": 50,
			"shadow-camera-bottom": -50,
			"shadow-bias": -1e-4
		}, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 302,
			columnNumber: 7
		}, this),
		/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("directionalLight", {
			position: [
				-30,
				30,
				30
			],
			intensity: .5
		}, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 315,
			columnNumber: 7
		}, this)
	] }, void 0, true, {
		fileName: _jsxFileName,
		lineNumber: 289,
		columnNumber: 5
	}, this);
};

	return [useGraphicsSettingsStore];
});
_c5 = SceneSetup;
// ------------------------------------------------------------------
// PLAYERS & CAMERAS

import { AudioEngine } from "/src/utils/AudioEngine.ts";
const CameraRig = ({ targetRef }) => {
	_s6();
	const { camera, scene } = useThree();
	// Removed direct AudioEngine.init, it's now handled by <AudioSystem />
	// Reusable vectors to optimize GC pressure by avoiding allocations in useFrame
	const offsetRef = useRef(new THREE.Vector3(0, 8, 15));
	const desiredPosRef = useRef(new THREE.Vector3());
	const lookAtPosRef = useRef(new THREE.Vector3());
	const currentLookAtRef = useRef(new THREE.Vector3());
	const raycaster = useMemo(() => new THREE.Raycaster(), []);
	const rayDir = useRef(new THREE.Vector3());
	useFrame((_state, delta) => {
		if (targetRef.current) {
			// 3rd Person MMORPG Follow Camera
			lookAtPosRef.current.copy(targetRef.current.position);
			lookAtPosRef.current.y += 2;
			desiredPosRef.current.copy(targetRef.current.position).add(offsetRef.current);
			// Collision-aware camera: Raycast from player head to desired camera position
			rayDir.current.subVectors(desiredPosRef.current, lookAtPosRef.current);
			const dist = rayDir.current.length();
			rayDir.current.normalize();
			raycaster.set(lookAtPosRef.current, rayDir.current);
			// Intersect only with environment meshes, skip players/triggers if possible
			const intersects = raycaster.intersectObjects(scene.children, true);
			let finalCameraPos = desiredPosRef.current;
			for (const hit of intersects) {
				// Ignore hits that are too close, or UI elements, or other players
				if (hit.distance < dist && hit.object.type === "Mesh" && !hit.object.userData?.isTrigger && !hit.object.userData?.isPlayer) {
					// Move camera slightly in front of the hit point
					finalCameraPos = hit.point.clone().sub(rayDir.current.clone().multiplyScalar(.5));
					break;
				}
			}
			camera.position.lerp(finalCameraPos, .1);
			currentLookAtRef.current.set(0, 0, -1).applyQuaternion(camera.quaternion).add(camera.position);
			currentLookAtRef.current.lerp(lookAtPosRef.current, .1);
			camera.lookAt(currentLookAtRef.current);
			// Process Audio Engine updates for Doppler and Occlusion
			AudioEngine.updateDopplerAndOcclusion(scene, delta);
		}
	});
	return null;
};
_s6(CameraRig, "eAdws/ihwJV1nEBCWVS8qxbVoD8=", false, function() {
	return [useThree, useFrame];
});
_c6 = CameraRig;
const WeaponSwingHitbox = ({ position, rotation, onHit }) => {
	_s7();
	const hitTargets = useRef(new Set());
	useBox(() => ({
		type: "Static",
		isTrigger: true,
		args: [
			3,
			2,
			3
		],
		position,
		rotation,
		onCollide: (e) => {
			const targetId = e.body.userData?.id;
			if (e.body.userData?.type === "enemy" && targetId) {
				if (!hitTargets.current.has(targetId)) {
					hitTargets.current.add(targetId);
					// Emit particles on hit
					useParticleStore.getState().emit([
						e.body.position.x,
						e.body.position.y + 1,
						e.body.position.z
					], [
						0,
						5,
						0
					], 20, "#ff8800", .5, .5);
					playHitSound([
						e.body.position.x,
						e.body.position.y,
						e.body.position.z
					]);
					if (onHit) onHit(targetId);
				}
			}
		}
	}));
	return null;
};
_s7(WeaponSwingHitbox, "zXPswBNEMIRgGuDttFmAhmQkQQw=", false, function() {
	return [useBox];
});
_c7 = WeaponSwingHitbox;
const ProjectileHitbox = ({ id, startPosition, direction, onHit }) => {
	_s8();
	const [ref] = useSphere(() => ({
		mass: 1,
		type: "Dynamic",
		isTrigger: true,
		args: [.5],
		position: startPosition,
		velocity: [
			direction[0] * 40,
			direction[1] * 40,
			direction[2] * 40
		],
		onCollide: (e) => {
			const targetId = e.body.userData?.id;
			if (e.body.userData?.type === "enemy" && targetId) {
				useParticleStore.getState().emit([
					e.body.position.x,
					e.body.position.y + 1,
					e.body.position.z
				], [
					0,
					2,
					0
				], 15, "#00f0ff", .3, .4);
				playHitSound([
					e.body.position.x,
					e.body.position.y,
					e.body.position.z
				]);
				if (onHit) onHit(targetId, id);
			}
		}
	}));
	return /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("mesh", {
		ref,
		children: [/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("sphereGeometry", { args: [.5] }, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 452,
			columnNumber: 7
		}, this), /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("meshStandardMaterial", {
			color: "#00f0ff",
			emissive: "#00f0ff",
			emissiveIntensity: 2
		}, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 453,
			columnNumber: 7
		}, this)]
	}, void 0, true, {
		fileName: _jsxFileName,
		lineNumber: 451,
		columnNumber: 5
	}, this);
};
_s8(ProjectileHitbox, "pzQYowg8IzAvLOim9slowETyqsg=", false, function() {
	return [useSphere];
});
_c8 = ProjectileHitbox;
const spriteLayerGeo = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(3, 4.5);
const SpriteLayer = ({ file, color, zOffset }) => {
	_s9();
	const tex = useTexture(file);
	const mat = useMemo(() => {
		return new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
			map: tex,
			transparent: true,
			side: THREE.DoubleSide,
			blending: THREE.AdditiveBlending,
			color,
			emissive: color,
			emissiveIntensity: .5
		});
	}, [tex, color]);
	useEffect(() => {
		return () => {
			mat.dispose();
		};
	}, [mat]);
	return /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("mesh", {
		position: [
			0,
			2.5,
			zOffset
		],
		geometry: spriteLayerGeo,
		material: mat
	}, void 0, false, {
		fileName: _jsxFileName,
		lineNumber: 482,
		columnNumber: 5
	}, this);
};
_s9(SpriteLayer, "eIrMxMmn6GCgT6xisqxKByyxp60=", false, function() {
	return [useTexture];
});
_c9 = SpriteLayer;
const flatSpriteGeo = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(3, 4.5);
const spriteBorderGeo = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(3.2, 4.7);
const borderMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
	color: "#00f0ff",
	transparent: true,
	opacity: .3,
	side: THREE.DoubleSide
});
const FlatSprite = ({ appearance }) => {
	_s10();
	const imgFile = appearance.portraitUrl || `/images/character_creator/hero_androgynous_1783304800858.png`;
	const texture = useTexture(imgFile);
	const mat = useMemo(() => {
		return new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
			map: texture,
			transparent: true,
			side: THREE.DoubleSide,
			emissive: "#111"
		});
	}, [texture]);
	useEffect(() => {
		return () => {
			mat.dispose();
		};
	}, [mat]);
	return /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(Billboard, {
		follow: true,
		lockX: false,
		lockY: false,
		lockZ: false,
		children: [/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("mesh", {
			position: [
				0,
				2.5,
				0
			],
			geometry: flatSpriteGeo,
			material: mat
		}, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 511,
			columnNumber: 7
		}, this), /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("mesh", {
			position: [
				0,
				2.5,
				-.05
			],
			geometry: spriteBorderGeo,
			material: borderMat
		}, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 513,
			columnNumber: 7
		}, this)]
	}, void 0, true, {
		fileName: _jsxFileName,
		lineNumber: 510,
		columnNumber: 5
	}, this);
};

const PlayerSprite = ({ appearance }) => {
	// If it's an NPC or old data with a portraitUrl but no customized presentation, use the flat texture.
	if (appearance?.portraitUrl && !appearance?.presentation) {
		return /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(FlatSprite, { appearance }, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 521,
			columnNumber: 12
		}, this);
	}
	const holoHeadMap = {
		"Masculine Presentation": "holo_head_masc_1783307851588.png",
		"Feminine Presentation": "holo_head_fem_1783307859017.png",
		"Androgynous / Nonbinary Presentation": "holo_head_andro_1783307865512.png"
	};
	const holoHairMap = {
		"short": "holo_hair_short_1783307878879.png",
		"long": "holo_hair_long_1783307886323.png"
	};
	const presentation = appearance?.presentation?.replace(" Face Presets", "") || "Androgynous / Nonbinary Presentation";
	const headFile = `/images/character_creator/${holoHeadMap[presentation] || holoHeadMap["Androgynous / Nonbinary Presentation"]}`;
	const isLongHair = appearance?.hairStyle?.toLowerCase().includes("long") || appearance?.hairStyle?.toLowerCase().includes("braid");
	const hasHair = appearance?.hairStyle && !appearance.hairStyle.toLowerCase().includes("bald");
	const hairFile = hasHair ? `/images/character_creator/${holoHairMap[isLongHair ? "long" : "short"]}` : null;
	const hasBeard = appearance?.facialHair && appearance.facialHair !== "Clean Shaven";
	const beardFile = hasBeard ? `/images/character_creator/holo_beard_full_1783307894762.png` : null;
	const skinColor = appearance?.skinHex || appearance?.color || "#00f0ff";
	const hairColor = appearance?.hairHex || "#00f0ff";
	return /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(Suspense, {
		fallback: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("group", {}, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 548,
			columnNumber: 25
		}, this),
		children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(Billboard, {
			follow: true,
			lockX: false,
			lockY: false,
			lockZ: false,
			children: [
				/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(SpriteLayer, {
					file: headFile,
					color: skinColor,
					zOffset: 0
				}, void 0, false, {
					fileName: _jsxFileName,
					lineNumber: 550,
					columnNumber: 9
				}, this),
				hairFile && /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(SpriteLayer, {
					file: hairFile,
					color: hairColor,
					zOffset: .01
				}, void 0, false, {
					fileName: _jsxFileName,
					lineNumber: 551,
					columnNumber: 22
				}, this),
				beardFile && /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(SpriteLayer, {
					file: beardFile,
					color: hairColor,
					zOffset: .02
				}, void 0, false, {
					fileName: _jsxFileName,
					lineNumber: 552,
					columnNumber: 23
				}, this),
				/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("mesh", {
					position: [
						0,
						2.5,
						-.05
					],
					children: [/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("planeGeometry", { args: [3.2, 4.7] }, void 0, false, {
						fileName: _jsxFileName,
						lineNumber: 555,
						columnNumber: 11
					}, this), /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("meshBasicMaterial", {
						color: skinColor,
						transparent: true,
						opacity: .3,
						side: THREE.DoubleSide
					}, void 0, false, {
						fileName: _jsxFileName,
						lineNumber: 556,
						columnNumber: 11
					}, this)]
				}, void 0, true, {
					fileName: _jsxFileName,
					lineNumber: 554,
					columnNumber: 9
				}, this)
			]
		}, void 0, true, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 549,
			columnNumber: 7
		}, this)
	}, void 0, false, {
		fileName: _jsxFileName,
		lineNumber: 548,
		columnNumber: 5
	}, this);
};
_c11 = PlayerSprite;
const LocalPlayer = ({ player, sendMove }) => {
	_s11();
	const lastSend = useRef(0);
	const sendAttack = useMultiplayerStore((state) => state.sendAttack);
	const previewAppearance = useMultiplayerStore((state) => state.previewAppearance);
	const handlePositionUpdate = (pos, _vel, _isGrounded) => {
		// Network sync (Rate limited to ~10 ticks per sec)
		const now = Date.now();
		if (now - lastSend.current > 100 && sendMove) {
			sendMove(pos[0], pos[1], pos[2]);
			lastSend.current = now;
		}
	};
	let asset = getAssetByType(player.modelFile);
	if (!asset) {
		asset = getCdnAssetPath("/models/sector_characters_glb_pack_v4/", player.modelFile || "spark.glb");
	}
	const effectiveAppearance = previewAppearance || player.appearance;
	const ref = useRef(null);
	return /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(_Fragment, { children: [/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(PlayerController, {
		initialPosition: [
			player.x,
			player.y + 5,
			player.z
		],
		onPositionUpdate: handlePositionUpdate,
		children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("group", {
			ref,
			children: effectiveAppearance ? /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(PlayerSprite, { appearance: effectiveAppearance }, void 0, false, {
				fileName: _jsxFileName,
				lineNumber: 590,
				columnNumber: 13
			}, this) : /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(OptimizedModel, {
				url: `${asset.rootUrl}${asset.sceneFilename}`,
				scaleToDimension: 2.5
			}, void 0, false, {
				fileName: _jsxFileName,
				lineNumber: 592,
				columnNumber: 13
			}, this)
		}, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 588,
			columnNumber: 9
		}, this)
	}, void 0, false, {
		fileName: _jsxFileName,
		lineNumber: 587,
		columnNumber: 7
	}, this), /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(CameraRig, { targetRef: ref }, void 0, false, {
		fileName: _jsxFileName,
		lineNumber: 596,
		columnNumber: 7
	}, this)] }, void 0, true, {
		fileName: _jsxFileName,
		lineNumber: 586,
		columnNumber: 5
	}, this);
};
_s11(LocalPlayer, "vQ/pLTNxy+oKYJf7ObWBZMd/dLY=", false, function() {
	return [useMultiplayerStore, useMultiplayerStore];
});
_c12 = LocalPlayer;
const RemotePlayer = ({ player, isBoss }) => {
	_s12();
	const targetPos = useMemo(() => new THREE.Vector3(player.x, player.y, player.z), [
		player.x,
		player.y,
		player.z
	]);
	const currentPos = useRef(new THREE.Vector3(player.x, player.y, player.z));
	// Register Kinematic box body in Cannon and fetch physics api
	const [ref, api] = useBox(() => ({
		mass: 1,
		type: "Kinematic",
		position: [
			player.x,
			player.y,
			player.z
		],
		args: [
			1,
			2,
			1
		],
		userData: {
			id: player.id,
			type: "enemy"
		}
	}));
	// Update physics body position directly rather than modifying the mesh ref to prevent desync
	useFrame((_state, delta) => {
		let targetX, targetY, targetZ;
		if (isBoss && bossIndices.has(player.id)) {
			const idx = bossIndices.get(player.id) * 6;
			targetX = bossBuffer[idx + 3];
			targetY = bossBuffer[idx + 4];
			targetZ = bossBuffer[idx + 5];
		} else if (!isBoss && playerIndices.has(player.id)) {
			const idx = playerIndices.get(player.id) * 6;
			targetX = playerBuffer[idx + 3];
			targetY = playerBuffer[idx + 4];
			targetZ = playerBuffer[idx + 5];
		}
		if (targetX !== undefined && targetY !== undefined && targetZ !== undefined) {
			targetPos.set(targetX, targetY, targetZ);
			currentPos.current.lerp(targetPos, 10 * delta);
		}
		api.position.set(currentPos.current.x, currentPos.current.y, currentPos.current.z);
	});
	let asset = getAssetByType(player.modelFile);
	if (!asset) {
		asset = getCdnAssetPath("/models/sector_characters_glb_pack_v4/", player.modelFile || "spark.glb");
	}
	return /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("group", {
		ref,
		children: player.appearance ? /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(PlayerSprite, { appearance: player.appearance }, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 643,
			columnNumber: 9
		}, this) : /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(OptimizedModel, {
			url: `${asset.rootUrl}${asset.sceneFilename}`,
			scaleToDimension: 2.5
		}, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 645,
			columnNumber: 9
		}, this)
	}, void 0, false, {
		fileName: _jsxFileName,
		lineNumber: 641,
		columnNumber: 5
	}, this);
};
_s12(RemotePlayer, "/oy1BjdgXPCIOzyZKlKHD79+wy8=", false, function() {
	return [useBox, useFrame];
});
_c13 = RemotePlayer;
const NPC = ({ npc, setInteractingNpcId }) => {
	_s13();
	const [hovered, setHovered] = useState(false);
	const [inRange, setInRange] = useState(false);
	const targetPos = useMemo(() => new THREE.Vector3(npc.x, npc.y, npc.z), [
		npc.x,
		npc.y,
		npc.z
	]);
	const currentPos = useRef(new THREE.Vector3(npc.x, npc.y, npc.z));
	// Register Kinematic box body in Cannon and fetch physics api
	const [ref, api] = useBox(() => ({
		mass: 1,
		type: "Kinematic",
		position: [
			npc.x,
			npc.y,
			npc.z
		],
		args: [
			1,
			2,
			1
		],
		userData: {
			id: npc.id,
			type: "enemy"
		}
	}));
	// Update physics body position directly rather than modifying the mesh ref to prevent desync
	useFrame((_state, delta) => {
		let targetX, targetY, targetZ;
		if (npcIndices.has(npc.id)) {
			const idx = npcIndices.get(npc.id) * 6;
			targetX = npcBuffer[idx + 3];
			targetY = npcBuffer[idx + 4];
			targetZ = npcBuffer[idx + 5];
		}
		if (targetX !== undefined && targetY !== undefined && targetZ !== undefined) {
			targetPos.set(targetX, targetY, targetZ);
			currentPos.current.lerp(targetPos, 10 * delta);
		}
		api.position.set(currentPos.current.x, currentPos.current.y, currentPos.current.z);
		const state = useMultiplayerStore.getState();
		const local = state.players.find((p) => p.id === state.sessionId);
		if (local && ref.current) {
			const dist = ref.current.position.distanceTo(new THREE.Vector3(local.x, local.y, local.z));
			if (dist < 10 && !inRange) setInRange(true);
			if (dist >= 10 && inRange) setInRange(false);
		}
	});
	const onClick = (e) => {
		e.stopPropagation();
	};
	useEffect(() => {
		if (inRange && setInteractingNpcId) {
			setInteractingNpcId(npc.id || npc.name || "Elder");
		} else if (!inRange && setInteractingNpcId) {
			// Clear if we were the one interacting
			setInteractingNpcId(null);
		}
	}, [
		inRange,
		setInteractingNpcId,
		npc.id,
		npc.name
	]);
	const asset = getCdnAssetPath("/models/sector_characters_glb_pack_v4/", npc.modelFile || "iron_warden.glb");
	return /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("group", {
		ref,
		onClick,
		onPointerOver: (e) => {
			e.stopPropagation();
			setHovered(true);
		},
		onPointerOut: () => {
			setHovered(false);
		},
		children: [npc.appearance && npc.appearance.portraitUrl ? /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(PlayerSprite, { appearance: npc.appearance }, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 715,
			columnNumber: 9
		}, this) : /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(OptimizedModel, {
			url: `${asset.rootUrl}${asset.sceneFilename}`,
			scaleToDimension: 2.5,
			colorTint: npc.appearance?.color
		}, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 717,
			columnNumber: 9
		}, this), inRange && /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(Html, {
			position: [
				0,
				4,
				0
			],
			center: true,
			zIndexRange: [100, 0],
			children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {
				style: {
					background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.8)",
					color: "white",
					padding: "4px 8px",
					borderRadius: "4px",
					border: "1px solid #f59e0b",
					pointerEvents: "none",
					whiteSpace: "nowrap",
					transform: hovered ? "scale(1.1)" : "scale(1)",
					transition: "transform 0.2s",
					fontFamily: "sans-serif",
					fontSize: "12px"
				},
				children: [
					/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("span", {
						style: {
							color: "#f59e0b",
							fontWeight: "bold",
							marginRight: "4px"
						},
						children: "[Click]"
					}, void 0, false, {
						fileName: _jsxFileName,
						lineNumber: 736,
						columnNumber: 13
					}, this),
					"Interact ",
					npc.name ? `with ${npc.name}` : ""
				]
			}, void 0, true, {
				fileName: _jsxFileName,
				lineNumber: 721,
				columnNumber: 11
			}, this)
		}, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 720,
			columnNumber: 9
		}, this)]
	}, void 0, true, {
		fileName: _jsxFileName,
		lineNumber: 708,
		columnNumber: 5
	}, this);
};
_s13(NPC, "Lez6ROgai0DLx7dgZ85mhufUHZc=", false, function() {
	return [useBox, useFrame];
});

const CharacterCreatorPreview = () => {
	_s15();
	const previewAppearance = useMultiplayerStore((state) => state.previewAppearance);
	const playerClass = useMultiplayerStore((state) => state.playerClass);
	// If playerClass is set, they've finished character creation and LocalPlayer will render.
	// We only render this fallback preview if they are actively customizing their character.
	if (playerClass || !previewAppearance) return null;
	// Render a standalone preview character with a static camera rig
	// Need a ref to attach the camera rig to
	return /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(_Fragment, { children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(StaticPreviewRig, { appearance: previewAppearance }, void 0, false, {
		fileName: _jsxFileName,
		lineNumber: 776,
		columnNumber: 7
	}, this) }, void 0, false, {
		fileName: _jsxFileName,
		lineNumber: 775,
		columnNumber: 5
	}, this);
};

_c16 = CharacterCreatorPreview;
const StaticPreviewRig = ({ appearance }) => {
	_s16();
	const { camera } = useThree();
	useEffect(() => {
		camera.position.set(0, 3, 10);
		camera.lookAt(-3, 2, 0);
	}, [camera]);
	return /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("group", {
		position: [
			-3,
			0,
			0
		],
		children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(PlayerSprite, { appearance }, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 791,
			columnNumber: 7
		}, this)
	}, void 0, false, {
		fileName: _jsxFileName,

const PlayersList = () => {
	_s17();
	const players = useMultiplayerStore((state) => state.players);
	const sessionId = useMultiplayerStore((state) => state.sessionId);
	useEffect(() => {
		// Only run this initialization once on mount
		initializePrefabs();
		// Only scatter if the map is empty (very naive check for demo purposes)
		const { entities } = usePrefabStore.getState();
		if (Object.keys(entities).length === 0) {
			scatterWorldProps(20, 100);
		}
	}, []);
	const localPlayerId = sessionId;
	const playerClass = useMultiplayerStore((state) => state.playerClass);
	const sendMove = useMultiplayerStore((state) => state.sendMove);
	const localPlayer = players.find((p) => p.id === localPlayerId);
	const remotePlayers = players.filter((p) => p.id !== localPlayerId);
	return /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(_Fragment, { children: [
		/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(CharacterCreatorPreview, {}, void 0, false, {
			fileName: _jsxFileName,
			lineNumber: 819,
			columnNumber: 7
		}, this),

			player: localPlayer,
			sendMove

			lineNumber: 821,
			columnNumber: 9

			columnNumber: 31
		}, this))
	] }, void 0, true, {

		lineNumber: 818,

const InterpolationSystem = () => {
	_s20();
	useFrame(() => {
		// Slight delay (e.g. 100ms) to allow snapshots to accumulate
		interpolateEntities(performance.now() - 100);
	});
	return null;
};

// ------------------------------------------------------------------
// MAIN RENDERER (Memoized to prevent 2D UI updates from triggering canvas updates)

export const WorldRenderer = _s21(React.memo(_c22 = _s21(({ setInteractingNpcId }) => {
	_s21();
	const resolutionScale = useGraphicsSettingsStore((state) => state.resolutionScale);
	const dpr = useMemo(() => Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, resolutionScale, 2), [resolutionScale]);
	const bloomEnabled = useGraphicsSettingsStore((state) => state.bloomEnabled);
	const vignetteEnabled = useGraphicsSettingsStore((state) => state.vignetteEnabled);
	const shadowQuality = useGraphicsSettingsStore((state) => state.shadowQuality);
	return /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {
		style: {
			width: "100vw",
			height: "100vh",
			background: "#000"
		},
		children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(Canvas, {
			shadows: shadowQuality !== "low",
			camera: {
				position: [
					0,
					15,
					20
				],
				fov: 60
			},
			dpr,
			children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(Suspense, {
				fallback: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("group", {}, void 0, false, {
					fileName: _jsxFileName,
					lineNumber: 879,
					columnNumber: 29
				}, this),
				children: [
					/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(SceneSetup, {}, void 0, false, {
						fileName: _jsxFileName,
						lineNumber: 880,
						columnNumber: 11
					}, this),
					/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(AudioSystem, {}, void 0, false, {
						fileName: _jsxFileName,
						lineNumber: 882,
						columnNumber: 13
					}, this),
					/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(ResourceSystem, {}, void 0, false, {
						fileName: _jsxFileName,
						lineNumber: 883,
						columnNumber: 13
					}, this),
					/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(ParticleManager, { maxParticles: 2e3 }, void 0, false, {
						fileName: _jsxFileName,
						lineNumber: 884,
						columnNumber: 11
					}, this),
					/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(InterpolationSystem, {}, void 0, false, {
						fileName: _jsxFileName,
						lineNumber: 885,
						columnNumber: 11
					}, this),
					/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(NavMeshProvider, { children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(Physics, {
						gravity: [
							0,
							-30,
							0
						],

_c23 = WorldRenderer;
WorldRenderer.displayName = "WorldRenderer";
var _c, _c2, _c3, _c4, _c5, _c6, _c7, _c8, _c9, _c10, _c11, _c12, _c13, _c14, _c15, _c16, _c17, _c18, _c19, _c20, _c21, _c22, _c23;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "OptimizedModel");
$RefreshReg$(_c2, "AnimatedModel");
$RefreshReg$(_c3, "PhysicsBox");
$RefreshReg$(_c4, "InstancedModel");
$RefreshReg$(_c5, "SceneSetup");
$RefreshReg$(_c6, "CameraRig");
$RefreshReg$(_c7, "WeaponSwingHitbox");
$RefreshReg$(_c8, "ProjectileHitbox");
$RefreshReg$(_c9, "SpriteLayer");
$RefreshReg$(_c10, "FlatSprite");
$RefreshReg$(_c11, "PlayerSprite");
$RefreshReg$(_c12, "LocalPlayer");
$RefreshReg$(_c13, "RemotePlayer");
$RefreshReg$(_c14, "NPC");
$RefreshReg$(_c15, "ObjectsList");
$RefreshReg$(_c16, "CharacterCreatorPreview");
$RefreshReg$(_c17, "StaticPreviewRig");
$RefreshReg$(_c18, "PlayersList");
$RefreshReg$(_c19, "BossesList");
$RefreshReg$(_c20, "NpcsList");
$RefreshReg$(_c21, "InterpolationSystem");
$RefreshReg$(_c22, "WorldRenderer$React.memo");
$RefreshReg$(_c23, "WorldRenderer");
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== 'undefined' && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
import * as __vite_react_currentExports from "/src/components/WorldRenderer.tsx";
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }

  const currentExports = __vite_react_currentExports;
  queueMicrotask(() => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("C:/Users/Kingr/Documents/antigravity/noble-pasteur/frontend/src/components/WorldRenderer.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("C:/Users/Kingr/Documents/antigravity/noble-pasteur/frontend/src/components/WorldRenderer.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
}
function $RefreshReg$(type, id) { return RefreshRuntime.register(type, "C:/Users/Kingr/Documents/antigravity/noble-pasteur/frontend/src/components/WorldRenderer.tsx" + ' ' + id); }
function $RefreshSig$() { return RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform(); }

//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,
